---
title: "Direction_Specific_Visuals"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "2025-06-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
###############################################################################
##  Direction-specific enrichment visuals (Up vs Down)                       ##
##  run *after* the main Pygo_gene_enrichment notebook                       ##
###############################################################################

## 1.  PACKAGES ---------------------------------------------------------------
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

cran_pkgs <- c("readxl", "openxlsx", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "stringr", "glue")
bio_pkgs  <- c("clusterProfiler", "ReactomePA", "KEGGREST", "org.Gg.eg.db")

for (p in cran_pkgs)
    if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE))
        install.packages(p, dependencies = TRUE)

for (p in bio_pkgs)
    if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE))
        BiocManager::install(p, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)

library(readxl);        library(openxlsx)
library(dplyr);         library(stringr);     library(ggplot2);   library(glue)
library(clusterProfiler);  library(ReactomePA);  library(KEGGREST)
library(org.Gg.eg.db)

orgDb     <- org.Gg.eg.db           # Gallus gallus
kegg_code <- "gga"                  # change if you use a different species

out_dir   <- "output"
dir.create(file.path(out_dir, "directional_plots"), showWarnings = FALSE)

## 2.  READ GENE LISTS --------------------------------------------------------
up_file   <- file.path(out_dir, "up_vs_down_summary.xlsx")

if (!file.exists(up_file))
    stop("Can’t find ", up_file,
         "\nMake sure you ran the first notebook and kept its output/ folder.")

up_sig   <- read_xlsx(up_file, sheet = "Up_Genes")
down_sig <- read_xlsx(up_file, sheet = "Down_Genes")

up_genes   <- unique(up_sig$ENTREZID)
down_genes <- unique(down_sig$ENTREZID)

gene_universe <- unique(c(up_genes, down_genes))

message("Up genes:   ", length(up_genes))
message("Down genes: ", length(down_genes))

## 3.  HELPERS ----------------------------------------------------------------
save_plot <- function(p, fname, w = 7, h = 5)
  ggsave(filename = file.path(out_dir, "directional_plots", fname),
         plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in")

make_dot_facet <- function(df, stub, title,
                           n_cat = 15, wrap_width = 45,
                           w = 7, h = 5) {
  if (!nrow(df)) return(invisible())

  df <- df %>%
        arrange(Regulation, p.adjust) %>%
        slice_head(n = n_cat) %>%
        mutate(Description = stringr::str_wrap(Description, width = wrap_width))

  ## Work out which x-variable we have (GeneRatio or NES)
  if (all(c("GeneRatio", "Count") %in% names(df))) {
      df <- df %>%
            tidyr::separate(GeneRatio, into = c("g1","g2"),
                            sep = "/", convert = TRUE) %>%
            mutate(GeneRatioNum = g1 / g2)
      x_var <- "GeneRatioNum"; x_lab <- "Gene ratio"; size_var <- "Count"
  } else {                    # GSEA - style
      x_var <- "NES";         x_lab <- "NES";       size_var <- "setSize"
  }

  gg <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = x_var,
                              y = paste0("reorder(Description,", x_var, ")"),
                              size = size_var,
                              colour = "p.adjust")) +
        geom_point() +
        scale_colour_continuous(low = "red", high = "blue", name = "adj-P") +
        scale_size(range = c(2, 6)) +
        labs(title = title, x = x_lab, y = NULL) +
        theme_bw() +
        facet_wrap(~ Regulation, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y")

  save_plot(gg, glue("dotplot_{stub}_UpDown.pdf"), w, h)
}

## 4.  ORA  (GO BP, KEGG, Reactome) ------------------------------------------
# 4a. GO-BP
ego_up   <- enrichGO(gene = up_genes,   OrgDb = orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID",
                     ont = "BP", universe = gene_universe, pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                     readable = TRUE)
ego_down <- enrichGO(gene = down_genes, OrgDb = orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID",
                     ont = "BP", universe = gene_universe, pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                     readable = TRUE)

ego_ud <- bind_rows(as.data.frame(ego_up)   %>% mutate(Regulation = "Up"),
                    as.data.frame(ego_down) %>% mutate(Regulation = "Down"))

make_dot_facet(ego_ud, "GO_ORA", "GO BP ORA (Up vs Down)")

# 4b. KEGG
message("Fetching KEGG mapping …")
kmap <- keggLink("pathway", kegg_code)

kegg_term2gene <- data.frame(
  term = sub("path:",           "", unname(kmap)),
  gene = sub(paste0(kegg_code, ":"), "", names(kmap)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
kdesc <- keggList("pathway", kegg_code)
kegg_term2name <- data.frame(
  term = sub("path:", "", names(kdesc)),
  name = sub(" - .*", "", unname(kdesc)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

ekegg_up <- enricher(gene = up_genes,   universe = gene_universe,
                     TERM2GENE = kegg_term2gene, TERM2NAME = kegg_term2name,
                     pAdjustMethod = "BH")
ekegg_down <- enricher(gene = down_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                       TERM2GENE = kegg_term2gene, TERM2NAME = kegg_term2name,
                       pAdjustMethod = "BH")

ekegg_ud <- bind_rows(
              as.data.frame(setReadable(ekegg_up,   orgDb, "ENTREZID")) %>%
                mutate(Regulation = "Up"),
              as.data.frame(setReadable(ekegg_down, orgDb, "ENTREZID")) %>%
                mutate(Regulation = "Down")
            )

make_dot_facet(ekegg_ud, "KEGG_ORA", "KEGG ORA (Up vs Down)")

# 4c. Reactome
ere_up   <- enrichPathway(gene = up_genes,   universe = gene_universe,
                          organism = "chicken", pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          readable = TRUE)
ere_down <- enrichPathway(gene = down_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                          organism = "chicken", pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          readable = TRUE)

ere_ud <- bind_rows(as.data.frame(ere_up)   %>% mutate(Regulation = "Up"),
                    as.data.frame(ere_down) %>% mutate(Regulation = "Down"))

make_dot_facet(ere_ud, "Reactome_ORA", "Reactome ORA (Up vs Down)")

## 5.  GSEA  (faceted by NES sign) -------------------------------------------
gsea_file <- file.path(out_dir, "enrichment_results_with_genes_and_summary.xlsx")

if (!file.exists(gsea_file))
    stop("Can’t find ", gsea_file,
         "\nMake sure the first notebook exported the summary workbook.")

gsea_go <- read_xlsx(gsea_file, sheet = "GO_GSEA")

gsea_ud <- gsea_go %>%
           mutate(Regulation = ifelse(NES > 0, "Up", "Down"))

make_dot_facet(gsea_ud, "GO_GSEA", "GO GSEA (Up vs Down)",
               n_cat = 20, w = 8, h = 6)

## 6.  Optional: simple bar-plot of term counts -------------------------------
term_counts <- gsea_ud %>%
               count(Regulation, name = "Pathways")

gg_counts <- ggplot(term_counts,
                    aes(x = Regulation, y = Pathways, fill = Regulation)) +
             geom_col(width = 0.6) +
             geom_text(aes(label = Pathways), vjust = -0.3) +
             labs(title = "Number of GSEA pathways by direction",
                  y = "Pathway count", x = NULL) +
             theme_bw()

save_plot(gg_counts, "gsea_pathway_direction_counts.pdf", 5, 4)

message("\n✓ Direction-specific plots saved to  ",
        file.path(out_dir, "directional_plots"))





```
